weather_anchor.headline: {{city}} wind and your {{neighborhood}} home
weather_anchor.body: Loose panels near {{landmark}} are the first sign of wind damage to your siding. In {{state}} storms, we often see unfastened vinyl blow off, exposing your sheathing to rot.

steps.title: Weather-Resist Barrier
steps.text: We install Tyvek or similar wrap near {{landmark}} to ensure a moisture-sealed exterior envelope.

steps.title: Courses & Flashing

steps.title: Detailed Caulk & Finish
steps.text: A full perimeter sealant application ensures your {{city}} home is airtight and maintenance-free.

seasonal_maintenance.headline: Cleaning your {{state}} exterior
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Check your soffit vents near {{parks}} for bird nests or debris before winter hibernation. Blocked vents cause attic mold.
seasonal_maintenance.summer_tips: Soft-wash your siding near {{neighborhood}} after spring pollen. High {{state}} humidity can cause algae growth on the north-facing planes.

comparison_guide.title: Vinyl vs. James Hardie Board for {{city}}

comparison.details: Vinyl is the affordable standard for {{city}}. Hardie Board near {{neighborhood}} is fire-rated and resists woodpecker and termite damage better in {{county}}.
